name: User Types Framework
summary: Two-dimensional classification for government service users - role and frequency determine design approach
keyInsight: Usage frequency matters more than role. A contractor filing daily permits needs efficiency patterns, not guided flows - even though they're a 'citizen'.

receivingService.description: People accessing or benefiting from government services

givingService.description: People administering or managing government services

guidedInfrequent.frequency: Once in a lifetime, annually, or rare

expertFrequent.mentalModel: I know what I'm doing, make me efficient

approach: Progressive disclosure - break into manageable steps
Plain language at grade 9 reading level
Error prevention with validation and confirmations

guidedReceiving.pattern: Step-by-step wizard, extensive help, one question per page

expertReceiving.pattern: Efficient form, bulk submission, saved preferences

expertGiving.pattern: Dashboard with queues, bulk actions, keyboard shortcuts
